summary: Comprehensive testing of RetailPro application completed. Backend APIs: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login, Dashboard, Navigation working correctly with minor non-blocking console errors.

minor.issue: Returns 400 error when fetching locations - visible in console

integration_issues.issue: Console error: subscriptionApi.getCurrent is not a function
Console error: Failed to fetch locations with 400 status

critical_code_review_comments: TransactionList component uses hardcoded mock data in some views - noted in iteration_7
Icon 'briefcase' not found in lucide mapping - may need icon fix

seed_data_verification.products: 10 products found across Electronics, Clothing, Food & Beverages categories

context_for_next_testing_agent: All core RetailPro features tested and working. Backend API tests created at /app/backend/tests/test_retailpro_apis.py. Order creation requires 'items' with 'subtotal' field and 'payments' array with PaymentInfo objects. API returns arrays directly instead of wrapped {items: []} objects for products, customers, orders.

frontend.dashboard: PASSED - shows stats, revenue chart, transactions
frontend.orders_page: PASSED - shows order list with filters
frontend.products_page: PASSED - shows product list with stock levels
